system.description: Favored by outlaws, bounty hunters, and lawmen, the Gunslinger Style is focused on speed.

benefit.description: Using a pistol, you can attempt to shoot a foe’s weapon out of their hand! This works as a “Quick Disarm” made using Savvy +Ranged instead of Might +Melee. Ranged penalties apply to the roll in addition to the base difficulty. The disarmed opponent also has a Close Call. When firing a pistol, you also ignore the -2 Penalty when hip-firing and the damage penalty for split actions.
benefit.name: Not So Fast!

finalSecret.description: When you spend Fortune to avoid a ranged attack, you do not get unnerved by a Close Call. In addition, you are so meticulous in the care and use of your pistols that you rarely ever overheat or misfire. When you roll a Jam or Overheat, you may spend a Fortune to simply avoid it.
finalSecret.name: Cool Under Fire
